9.reason: [Incorrectly skips two characters; should skip only the '0' and the decimal point (i.e., i = 2 assumes input starts with "0."), but if input is just "0" or malformed, this causes out-of-bounds access. Also, doesn't validate presence of decimal point.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly skips two characters; should skip only the '0' and the decimal point (i.e., i = 2 assumes input starts with "0."), but if input is just "0" or malformed, this causes out-of-bounds access. Also, doesn't validate presence of decimal point.]

65.reason: [Use of unsafe function 'gets' which is deprecated and removed in modern C standards; causes compilation error with modern compilers. Should use fgets instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Use of unsafe function 'gets' which is deprecated and removed in modern C standards; causes compilation error with modern compilers. Should use fgets instead.]
